channel.title: Nuuu Updates
channel.description: Signed updates for Nuuu for Mac.

item.title: 0.2.0-beta.3
item.description:
# Nuuu 0.2 Beta 3
This prerelease continues the 0.2 test cycle with the latest app polish and stability fixes from `main`.
It should be published with Sparkle build `4` so users on 0.2 Beta 2, build `3`, are offered the update instead of seeing "You're up to date."

# Nuuu 0.2 Beta 2
This prerelease contains the complete duplicate cleanup, scheduling, scan progress, notification, RAM reporting, and Sparkle update work now merged into Nuuu's `main` branch.
It also includes compatibility fixes for Quick Look thumbnails and notifications when building with Xcode 16.4.
This testing build is Sparkle-signed but not Apple-notarized. macOS may display a security warning during installation.

item.title: 0.2.0-beta.1
item.description:
# Nuuu 0.2.0 Beta 1
This prerelease brings a substantial cleanup and monitoring update:
- Finds exact duplicate files, previews them with thumbnails, and keeps one original. - Moves duplicate batches to Trash with responsive progress and safer path checks. - Adds full-pane scan and cleanup processing overlays with honest progress. - Adds scheduled deep-junk cleanup with completion notifications. - Adds gentle critical-memory notifications and clearer RAM accounting. - Scans the startup drive for large files using a new 100 MB default threshold. - Adds background launch at login, device-aware Overview copy, and update settings. - Adds signed Sparkle update checks and a public update feed.
This testing build is Sparkle-signed but not Apple-notarized. macOS may display a security warning during installation.
